name: @agentdeck/backend
description: AgentDeck backend — HTTP event ingest + WebSocket fanout + Agent state machine

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
